Name: USplineComponent
Description: A spline component is a spline shape which can be used for other purposes (e.g. animating objects). It contains debug rendering capabilities.

Variables.Name: SplineInfo_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Deprecated - please use GetSplinePointsPosition() to fetch this FInterpCurve

Variables.Name: SplineRotInfo_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Deprecated - please use GetSplinePointsRotation() to fetch this FInterpCurve

Variables.Name: SplineScaleInfo_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Deprecated - please use GetSplinePointsScale() to fetch this FInterpCurve

Variables.Name: ReparamStepsPerSegment
Variables.Description: Number of steps per spline segment to place in the reparameterization table

Variables.Name: Duration
Variables.Description: Specifies the duration of the spline in seconds

Variables.Name: bStationaryEndpoints
Variables.Description: Whether the endpoints of the spline are considered stationary when traversing the spline at non-constant velocity.  Essentially this sets the endpoints' tangents to zero vectors.

Variables.Name: bSplineHasBeenEdited
Variables.Description: Whether the spline has been edited from its default by the spline component visualizer

Variables.Name: bModifiedByConstructionScript
Variables.Description: Whether the UCS has made changes to the spline points

Variables.Name: bInputSplinePointsToConstructionScript
Variables.Description:
Whether the spline points should be passed to the User Construction Script so they can be further manipulated by it.
	  If false, they will not be visible to it, and it will not be able to influence the per-instance positions set in the editor.

Variables.Name: bDrawDebug
Variables.Description: If true, the spline will be rendered if the Splines showflag is set.

Variables.Name: bClosedLoop
Variables.Description:
Whether the spline is to be considered as a closed loop.
	  Use SetClosedLoop() to set this property, and IsClosedLoop() to read it.

Variables.Name: DefaultUpVector
Variables.Description: Default up vector in local space to be used when calculating transforms along the spline

Variables.Name: EditorUnselectedSplineSegmentColor
Variables.Description:
Engine Modify End
	 
	 Color of an unselected spline component segment in the editor

Variables.Name: EditorSelectedSplineSegmentColor
Variables.Description: Color of a selected spline component segment in the editor

Variables.Name: bAllowDiscontinuousSpline
Variables.Description: Whether the spline's leave and arrive tangents can be different

Variables.Name: bShouldVisualizeScale
Variables.Description: Whether scale visualization should be displayed

Variables.Name: ScaleVisualizationWidth
Variables.Description: Width of spline in editor for use with scale visualization

Functions.Name: UpdateSpline
Functions.Description: Update the spline tangents and SplineReparamTable

Functions.Name: GetDistanceAlongSplineAtSplineInputKey
Functions.Description: Get distance along the spline at the provided input key value

Functions.Name: SetUnselectedSplineSegmentColor
Functions.Description: Specify unselected spline component segment color in the editor

Functions.Name: SetSelectedSplineSegmentColor
Functions.Description: Specify selected spline component segment color in the editor

Functions.Name: SetDrawDebug
Functions.Description: Specify whether this spline should be rendered when the EditorGame spline show flag is set

Functions.Name: SetClosedLoop
Functions.Description: Specify whether the spline is a closed loop or not. The loop position will be at 1.0 after the last point's input key

Functions.Name: SetClosedLoopAtPosition
Functions.Description: Specify whether the spline is a closed loop or not, and if so, the input key corresponding to the loop point

Functions.Name: IsClosedLoop
Functions.Description: Check whether the spline is a closed loop or not

Functions.Name: ClearSplinePoints
Functions.Description: Clears all the points in the spline

Functions.Name: AddPoint
Functions.Description: Adds an FSplinePoint to the spline. This contains its input key, position, tangent, rotation and scale.

Functions.Name: AddPoints
Functions.Description: Adds an array of FSplinePoints to the spline.

Functions.Name: AddSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Adds a point to the spline

Functions.Name: AddSplinePointAtIndex
Functions.Description: Adds a point to the spline at the specified index

Functions.Name: RemoveSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Removes point at specified index from the spline

Functions.Name: AddSplineWorldPoint
Functions.Description: Adds a world space point to the spline

Functions.Name: AddSplineLocalPoint
Functions.Description: Adds a local space point to the spline

Functions.Name: SetSplinePoints
Functions.Description: Sets the spline to an array of points

Functions.Name: SetSplineWorldPoints
Functions.Description: Sets the spline to an array of world space points

Functions.Name: SetSplineLocalPoints
Functions.Description: Sets the spline to an array of local space points

Functions.Name: SetLocationAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Move an existing point to a new location

Functions.Name: SetWorldLocationAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Move an existing point to a new world location

Functions.Name: SetTangentAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Specify the tangent at a given spline point

Functions.Name: SetTangentsAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Specify the tangents at a given spline point

Functions.Name: SetUpVectorAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Specify the up vector at a given spline point

Functions.Name: GetSplinePointType
Functions.Description: Get the type of a spline point

Functions.Name: SetSplinePointType
Functions.Description: Specify the type of a spline point

Functions.Name: GetNumberOfSplinePoints
Functions.Description: Get the number of points that make up this spline

Functions.Name: GetLocationAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Get the location at spline point

Functions.Name: GetWorldLocationAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Get the world location at spline point

Functions.Name: GetDirectionAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Get the location at spline point

Functions.Name: GetTangentAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Get the tangent at spline point. This fetches the Leave tangent of the point.

Functions.Name: GetArriveTangentAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Get the arrive tangent at spline point

Functions.Name: GetLeaveTangentAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Get the leave tangent at spline point

Functions.Name: GetRotationAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Get the rotation at spline point as a rotator

Functions.Name: GetUpVectorAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Get the up vector at spline point

Functions.Name: GetRightVectorAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Get the right vector at spline point

Functions.Name: GetRollAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Get the amount of roll at spline point, in degrees

Functions.Name: GetScaleAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Get the scale at spline point

Functions.Name: GetTransformAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Get the transform at spline point

Functions.Name: GetLocationAndTangentAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Get location and tangent at a spline point

Functions.Name: GetLocalLocationAndTangentAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Get local location and tangent at a spline point

Functions.Name: GetDistanceAlongSplineAtSplinePoint
Functions.Description: Get the distance along the spline at the spline point

Functions.Name: GetSplineLength
Functions.Description: Returns total length along this spline

Functions.Name: SetDefaultUpVector
Functions.Description: Sets the default up vector used by this spline

Functions.Name: GetDefaultUpVector
Functions.Description: Gets the default up vector used by this spline

Functions.Name: GetInputKeyAtDistanceAlongSpline
Functions.Description: Given a distance along the length of this spline, return the corresponding input key at that point

Functions.Name: GetTimeAtDistanceAlongSpline
Functions.Description: Given a distance along the length of this spline, return the corresponding time at that point

Functions.Name: GetLocationAtDistanceAlongSpline
Functions.Description: Given a distance along the length of this spline, return the point in space where this puts you

Functions.Name: GetWorldLocationAtDistanceAlongSpline
Functions.Description: Given a distance along the length of this spline, return the point in world space where this puts you

Functions.Name: GetDirectionAtDistanceAlongSpline
Functions.Description: Given a distance along the length of this spline, return a unit direction vector of the spline tangent there.

Functions.Name: GetWorldDirectionAtDistanceAlongSpline
Functions.Description: Given a distance along the length of this spline, return a unit direction vector of the spline tangent there, in world space.

Functions.Name: GetTangentAtDistanceAlongSpline
Functions.Description: Given a distance along the length of this spline, return the tangent vector of the spline there.

Functions.Name: GetWorldTangentAtDistanceAlongSpline
Functions.Description: Given a distance along the length of this spline, return the tangent vector of the spline there, in world space.

Functions.Name: GetRotationAtDistanceAlongSpline
Functions.Description: Given a distance along the length of this spline, return a rotation corresponding to the spline's rotation there.

Functions.Name: GetWorldRotationAtDistanceAlongSpline
Functions.Description: Given a distance along the length of this spline, return a rotation corresponding to the spline's rotation there, in world space.

Functions.Name: GetUpVectorAtDistanceAlongSpline
Functions.Description: Given a distance along the length of this spline, return a unit direction vector corresponding to the spline's up vector there.

Functions.Name: GetRightVectorAtDistanceAlongSpline
Functions.Description: Given a distance along the length of this spline, return a unit direction vector corresponding to the spline's right vector there.

Functions.Name: GetRollAtDistanceAlongSpline
Functions.Description: Given a distance along the length of this spline, return the spline's roll there, in degrees.

Functions.Name: GetScaleAtDistanceAlongSpline
Functions.Description: Given a distance along the length of this spline, return the spline's scale there.

Functions.Name: GetTransformAtDistanceAlongSpline
Functions.Description: Given a distance along the length of this spline, return an FTransform corresponding to that point on the spline.

Functions.Name: GetLocationAtTime
Functions.Description: Given a time from 0 to the spline duration, return the point in space where this puts you

Functions.Name: GetWorldLocationAtTime
Functions.Description: Given a time from 0 to the spline duration, return the point in space where this puts you

Functions.Name: GetDirectionAtTime
Functions.Description: Given a time from 0 to the spline duration, return a unit direction vector of the spline tangent there.

Functions.Name: GetWorldDirectionAtTime
Functions.Description: Given a time from 0 to the spline duration, return a unit direction vector of the spline tangent there.

Functions.Name: GetTangentAtTime
Functions.Description: Given a time from 0 to the spline duration, return the spline's tangent there.

Functions.Name: GetRotationAtTime
Functions.Description: Given a time from 0 to the spline duration, return a rotation corresponding to the spline's position and direction there.

Functions.Name: GetWorldRotationAtTime
Functions.Description: Given a time from 0 to the spline duration, return a rotation corresponding to the spline's position and direction there.

Functions.Name: GetUpVectorAtTime
Functions.Description: Given a time from 0 to the spline duration, return the spline's up vector there.

Functions.Name: GetRightVectorAtTime
Functions.Description: Given a time from 0 to the spline duration, return the spline's right vector there.

Functions.Name: GetTransformAtTime
Functions.Description: Given a time from 0 to the spline duration, return the spline's transform at the corresponding position.

Functions.Name: GetRollAtTime
Functions.Description: Given a time from 0 to the spline duration, return the spline's roll there, in degrees.

Functions.Name: GetScaleAtTime
Functions.Description: Given a time from 0 to the spline duration, return the spline's scale there.

Functions.Name: FindInputKeyClosestToWorldLocation
Functions.Description: Given a location, in world space, return the input key closest to that location.

Functions.Name: FindLocationClosestToWorldLocation
Functions.Description: Given a location, in world space, return the point on the curve that is closest to the location.

Functions.Name: FindDirectionClosestToWorldLocation
Functions.Description: Given a location, in world spcae, return a unit direction vector of the spline tangent closest to the location.

Functions.Name: FindTangentClosestToWorldLocation
Functions.Description: Given a location, in world space, return the tangent vector of the spline closest to the location.

Functions.Name: FindRotationClosestToWorldLocation
Functions.Description: Given a location, in world space, return rotation corresponding to the spline's rotation closest to the location.

Functions.Name: FindUpVectorClosestToWorldLocation
Functions.Description: Given a location, in world space, return a unit direction vector corresponding to the spline's up vector closest to the location.

Functions.Name: FindRightVectorClosestToWorldLocation
Functions.Description: Given a location, in world space, return a unit direction vector corresponding to the spline's right vector closest to the location.

Functions.Name: FindRollClosestToWorldLocation
Functions.Description: Given a location, in world space, return the spline's roll closest to the location, in degrees.

Functions.Name: FindScaleClosestToWorldLocation
Functions.Description: Given a location, in world space, return the spline's scale closest to the location.

Functions.Name: FindTransformClosestToWorldLocation
Functions.Description: Given a location, in world space, return an FTransform closest to that location.
